summary: FQ-09S skill tree visual treatment: presentation-only star-map restyle of the FQ-06 panel. Night-sky backdrop with thin cool border; the node canvas draws a deterministic starfield (seed 20260709, 110 pixels), faint constellation links per prerequisite pair (bright when both ends owned, soft white toward available, near-invisible toward locked), and pixel star glyphs (4-arm crosshair; larger 8-arm star when owned); node buttons became dark plaques with state-colored borders/text instead of whole-button modulate. Perk data, point economy, prerequisites, save ownership, K/Esc behavior, the try_purchase_perk path, and the inspector text format are byte-identical — all fq06_* checks pass unchanged. New link_count() hook + fq09s_constellation_links_match_prereqs check (suite 184 -> 185). Review SIGNABLE with three nits, all applied; full loop re-ran green.
scope: FQ-09S only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md — no new perks, effects, or progression economy. Implementation commit 177d2ae plus this evidence-only packet commit; not pushed (operator-gated).
